reviews.review_title: I’m going to cry tears of joy
reviews.review_description: A long time ago there was a game I think was called lethal ape pvp. It was a fun game with an original idea, and it was loved by all who played it. Then lethal ape sold their games, and lethal ape pvp was no more. Eventually someone tried to remake it as a separate world in another gorrila tag fan game, but it just wasn’t the same. Now after all these years the original is back and better than ever. To the creator of this game, thank you, and I wish you and your family health and prosperity.
